channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania–China consider pilot 10-day visa-free transit arrangement for business travellers in transit
item.description: Tanzania and China are currently in discussions over a proposed pilot arrangement that would allow eligible Tanzanian travellers transiting through China to third countries to enter China without a vi...

item.title: SpaceX Set to Join NASDAQ-100 Index
item.description: The NASDAQ-100 index is set to include SpaceX, marking a significant milestone for the aerospace company. This inclusion reflects SpaceX's growing influence in the technology and stock markets. The de...

item.title: Mahlangu urges swift succession plan for Bafana Bafana coaching staff
item.description: Bongani Magasela reports that legendary Orlando Pirates striker Bashin Mahlangu has called for a rapid transition plan involving Pitso Mosimane, Rulani Mokwena, Manqoba Mnqithi, and Fadlu Davids to gu...

item.title: Iran mourns assassinated supreme leader with massive funeral procession
item.description: The funeral procession of Iran's assassinated supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei began in Tehran, drawing millions of mourners. Authorities estimated the turnout to rival the numbers from his prede...

item.title: Voluntary Surrender as Mitigating Factor in Convictions
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) clarified that voluntary surrender by an accused individual may be considered a mitigating circumstance when determining the penalty for a conviction. Justice Undersecr...

item.title: England Advances to World Cup Quarter-Finals After Thrilling Victory Over Mexico
item.description: England fans in Manchester celebrated a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Mexico to secure a place in the World Cup quarter-finals, enduring a chaotic night of delays, a red card, and a tense finish. The m...

item.title: Food Allergy Dilemma: Balancing Snack Sharing and Allergen Concerns at a Large Event
item.description: The article discusses a person's dilemma of whether to bring a planned snack to a large event after being warned that a single attendee has severe allergies to multiple common foods. The individual ha...

item.title: Genomics Advances in Tanzanian Healthcare
item.description: Muhimbili University of Health and Allied Sciences (Muhas) launched next-generation sequencing (NGS) services at its 14th Scientific Conference, marking a pivotal step toward precision medicine and im...

item.title: Man Sentenced to Seven Years for Defiling Minor, Ordered to Pay N5 Million Compensation
item.description: A 25-year-old man, Jerry Njoku, has been sentenced to seven years imprisonment with hard labour by a Rivers State High Court for defiling a 10-year-old girl. Justice Rita Oguguo emphasized the gravity...

item.title: Australian Women's Cricket Team Wins T20 World Cup Amid FIFA World Cup Coverage
item.description: The Australian women’s cricket team has claimed their 14th T20 World Cup title, defeating England on home soil. Despite this historic achievement, the win has received minimal attention in Australia, ...

item.title: Brandon Declares State of Emergency as River Levels Rise
item.description: The City of Brandon has declared a state of emergency due to provincial forecasts predicting rising water levels in the Assiniboine and Shellmouth river basins. Mayor Jeff Fawcett emphasized the preca...

item.title: Kenya's Millennials Celebrate Nostalgia at Ngong Racecourse Event
item.description: Thousands of revelers gathered at Ngong Racecourse for the annual Millennials Cookout, a vibrant celebration of 90s and early 2000s nostalgia. The event featured a Rodeo Chic theme with attendees dres...

item.title: Sabalenka Reflects on Wimbledon Loss to Osaka, Vows to Improve
item.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka suffered a fourth-round defeat to Naomi Osaka at Wimbledon 2026, marking her first straight-sets loss in a Grand Slam in six years. The match, played on Centre Court, ...

item.title: Landslide Disrupts Mumbai-Pune Expressway Traffic Amid Heavy Rains
item.description: A major landslide blocked the Mumbai-Pune expressway's 'Missing Link' section, halting traffic on Monday. The incident occurred in a landslide-prone area of the Rs 7,000 crore project inaugurated just...

item.title: Ronaldo Announces 2026 World Cup as Final Tournament
item.description: Portugal's football icon, Cristiano Ronaldo, has officially declared that the 2026 FIFA World Cup will mark the end of his international career. The 41-year-old captain made this revelation ahead of P...

item.title: Government Defends Fuel Procurement Arrangement with Vitol Supplier Amid Opposition Accusations
item.description: The fuel import debate in Tanzania has intensified as the government defends its decision to engage Swiss-based supplier Vitol for petroleum products. Opposition parties ACT-Wazalendo and Chadema have...

item.title: Senate approves Chiz Escudero as presiding officer for Sara Duterte's impeachment trial
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte began in the Senate on July 6, 2026, with Senator Chiz Escudero presiding over the proceedings. This decision followed a constitutional debate, as ...

item.title: PPP Leader Amjad Hussain Sworn In As Gilgit-Baltistan Chief Minister
item.description: Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) leader Amjad Hussain was sworn in as the new chief minister of Gilgit-Baltistan on Monday, following his party’s victory in the 2026 regional elections. The oath-taking ce...

item.title: Rivers State Government Urged to Resolve Chieftaincy Dispute
item.description: The Rumueme Council in Rivers State has demanded the Rivers State Government (RSG) to intervene in a long-standing chieftaincy dispute, highlighting the need for a formal inquiry to resolve the confli...

item.title: Democrats Should Respect Military Software Providers
item.description: The article argues that Democrats must recognize the critical role of military software providers in national security. Author Max Baucus, a former U.S. Senator and ambassador to China, emphasizes tha...
